name: RHINOCEREBRAL MUCORMYCOSIS
definition: paranasal sinus / orbital infection caused by nonseptated fungi Rhizopus arrhizus and
dominant_finding: propensity for vascular invasion by fungal hyphae ← production of elastase
discriminating_features: propensity for vascular invasion by fungal hyphae ← production of elastase
nodular thickening involving nasal septum + turbinates

general: propensity for vascular invasion by fungal hyphae ← production of elastase
nodular thickening involving nasal septum + turbinates

clinical.Spread: fungus first involves nasal cavity, then extends into maxillary / ethmoid sinuses / orbits
